author: y4rr
content: Plan: Phase D.3 closes the tabular/classical ML gap. ferrotorch-ml is the sklearn-equivalent crate. Will build real-artifact parity harness for 5 ops: PCA fit_transform, StandardScaler fit_transform, OneHotEncoder fit_transform, KFold splits, train_test_split. Generate sklearn reference outputs on fixed deterministic data, save to HF dataset ferrotorch/ml-sklearn-parity-v1, write rust dump example, python verification harness, and #[ignore]-gated conformance test. TOL per spec (cosine_sim PCA, max_abs StandardScaler, exact OneHot, set-equality KFold/train_test_split).
